gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/234)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/234)
text: قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) مَنْ قُسِمَ لَهُ الرِّفْقُ قُسِمَ لَهُ الْإِيمَانُ .

en.hubeali: And by his chain, he said,
‘Abu Ja’farasws said: ‘The one for whom the kindness is apportioned to, the Emān would be apportioned to him (as well)’.
en.sarwar: 2. Through the same chain of narrators it is narrated from abu Ja’far (a.s.) who has said the following: “Whoever has received a share of friendliness has received a share of belief.”
